errors.message:
Syntax error at line logfile-1.htm:371:
 `",` was unexpected

Syntax error at line samples/+reactor/components/msgbox/msgbox.htm:4:
 `<style src="sciter:msgbox.css" />` was unexpected

Syntax error at line samples/goodies/sys-info.htm:93:
 `> and` was unexpected

Syntax error at line samples/ideas/KiTE/readme.htm:1:
 `This is Sciter port of the` was unexpected
